description_long: This is a flat-panel ASUS computer monitor with a widescreen display, encased in a matte black plastic housing. The front features a moderately thick bezel with rounded corners, framing the screen, and a row of small, red indicator buttons along the lower right edge. The monitor is supported by a circular pedestal stand, which is broad and stable, made of matching black plastic. The rear panel is plain with a subtle ASUS logo embossed in the center and a recessed area likely for ports and labels. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for both office and home environments, with no visible ports or cables from the provided views.
description: A sleek, black ASUS widescreen computer monitor with a rounded bezel and a circular pedestal stand. The front features a row of red indicator buttons and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, moderately thick bezel, ASUS logo, and a row of red indicator buttons along the lower right edge.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the monitor's slim depth and the circular pedestal stand, with no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ASUS logo, a recessed area for labels, and the back of the pedestal stand, with no visible ports.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slimness of the monitor and the round base, with no visible controls or ports.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, matte black, with rounded corners and a smooth, untextured finish. It features a subtle color contrast with the screen and has a row of small red indicator buttons on the lower right.
attribute_stand_type: Circular pedestal stand made of black plastic, broad and flat for stability, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A row of small, round buttons is located along the lower right edge of the front bezel, grouped together.
attribute_brand_logo: ASUS logo is present, centered on the rear panel in a subtle, embossed style. Another small logo is visible on the lower front bezel.
